# plot_overlay { #neuroim.plot_overlay }

```python
plot_overlay(
    base_vol=None,
    overlay_vol=None,
    alpha=0.5,
    base_cmap="gray",
    overlay_cmap="hot",
    threshold=None,
    coords=None,
    figsize=(12, 4),
    axes=None,
    *,
    coord_space="voxel",
    unit=None,
    background=None,
    overlay=None,
    bg_cmap=None,
    ov_cmap=None,
    zlevels=None,
    axis=2,
    along=None,
    ncol=3,
    bg_range="robust",
    ov_range="robust",
    probs=(0.02, 0.98),
    ov_thresh=None,
    alpha_mode="binary",
    ov_alpha_mode=None,
    symmetric=None,
    ov_symmetric=None,
    alpha_gamma=None,
    ov_cap=None,
    title=None,
    colorbar=False,
)
```

Overlay a statistical or label volume on a background volume.

With ``zlevels=None``, this returns a three-plane orthogonal view. With
``zlevels`` supplied, it returns a neuroim2-style slice montage. Inputs must
occupy the same grid when both carry ``NeuroSpace`` metadata.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name | Type | Description | Default |
|------|------|-------------|---------|
| base_vol, background | NeuroVol or array-like | Background image. ``background`` is the keyword alias. | _required_ |
| overlay_vol, overlay | NeuroVol or array-like | Overlay image on the same grid. ``overlay`` is the keyword alias. | _required_ |
| alpha | float | Global overlay alpha. Per-pixel alpha modes multiply this value. | ``0.5`` |
| base_cmap, bg_cmap | str, sequence, or Colormap | Background colormap. | ``"gray"`` |
| overlay_cmap, ov_cmap | str, sequence, or Colormap | Overlay colormap. Signed overlays default to ``"blue-red"`` when no diverging palette is supplied. | ``"hot"`` |
| threshold, ov_thresh | float or tuple | Hide overlay values below threshold. Tuple thresholds hide values between the two endpoints. | ``None`` |
| coords | tuple | Voxel or world coordinate for orthogonal views. The volume center is used when omitted. | ``None`` |
| coord_space, unit | str | ``"voxel"``/``"index"`` or ``"world"``/``"mm"`` for ``coords``. | ``"voxel"`` |
| zlevels | sequence of int | Python slice indices for montage mode. | ``None`` |
| axis | int or str | Slice axis for montage mode. | ``2`` |
| along | int | neuroim2-style one-based slice axis. Overrides ``axis`` when provided. | ``None`` |
| ncol | int | Number of montage columns. | ``3`` |
| bg_range, ov_range | str or tuple | Display ranges: ``"robust"``, ``"data"``, or explicit ``(lo, hi)``. | ``"robust"`` |
| probs | tuple | Quantiles used for robust ranges. | ``(0.02, 0.98)`` |
| alpha_mode, ov_alpha_mode | str | Overlay alpha mode: ``"binary"``, ``"proportional"``, ``"ramp"``, or ``"soft"``. | ``"binary"`` |
| symmetric, ov_symmetric | bool | Force symmetric overlay limits around zero. Defaults to signed-data detection. | ``None`` |
| alpha_gamma | float | Optional exponent for ``alpha_mode="soft"``. | ``None`` |
| ov_cap | float | Shared overlay color/alpha cap. | ``None`` |
| title | str | Figure title. | ``None`` |
| colorbar | bool | Draw a shared overlay colorbar. | ``False`` |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
|  | (fig, axes) tuple | Matplotlib Figure and displayed Axes. |
